English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean Edward C. Melby records
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. Office of the Dean
Melby, Edward C.
24-1-3380
3.0 cubic feet. 3.0 cubic feet.
1964-1986-(bulk 1975-1984) Subject files. Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during Edward C. Melby's tenure as dean. Collection material in English 5145722
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Laura Finkel
Date completed:
September 2004
EAD encoding:
Laura Finkel, 2004
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Edward C. Melby, Jr. was Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine from 1975-1984.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence and subject files compiled by the Office of the Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine during Edward C. Melby's tenure as dean.
COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
In original order.
Cite As:
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of the Dean records, #24-01-3380. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Veterinary medicine -- Study and teaching. Melby, Edward C. New York State College of Veterinary Medicine
